subject.description: Caller identity and caller-local attributes. CHP v0.1 does not prescribe an identity provider.

mandate.description: OPTIONAL presented authority (chp-v0.2.md section 10): a principal-signed, expiring, capability-scoped grant naming the caller as delegate. The host verifies it before executing; when valid, the evidence subject becomes {type: 'mandate', id: delegate_id, principal, mandate_id, verified: true}. Omitted = today's behavior (additive).

actor.description: OPTIONAL first-class actor (chp-application-contract.md section 3.1, proposal 0034): a structured, caller-asserted identity. The verified subject remains the accountability record; actor enriches it and drives per-actor policy (descriptor.policy.allowed_actors). Omitted = today's behavior (additive).
